holdings.infoBox: XYLD is an equity ETF with a total of 506 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.83%, Apple at 6.84%, Microsoft at 4.43%, Amazon.com at 3.65%, and Alphabet at 3.35%.

overview.description: The Global X S&P 500 Covered Call ETF (XYLD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Cboe S&P 500 BuyWrite index. The fund tracks an index of S&P 500 stocks and sells one-month, at-the-money call options on up to 100% of each stock. XYLD was launched on Jun 24, 2013 and is issued by Global X.
